name: Ballista Blast
description: Hybrid monophonic synth voice with subtractive, wavetable, and FM engines, analog filtering and VCA, assignable envelope and random source, velocity input, SD-card preset memory, and Select Bus recall.

controls.name: Tune
controls.description: Encoder-based pitch calibration for the voice. Sets the current root and trims pitch without menu diving.

controls.name: Engine Select
controls.description: Chooses Classic, Wavetable, or FM synthesis architecture.

controls.name: FM Index
controls.description: Sets modulation depth for the FM engine. Responds to direct control and CV.
controls.detail: direct + CV control · attenuverting CV input

controls.name: Ratio
controls.description: Sets operator ratio range. Lock switch selects free or precise ratios.
controls.detail: free / locked ratios · direct + CV control

controls.name: Wave
controls.description: Selects the active operator waveform set.

controls.name: Envelope Assign
controls.description: Routes the onboard envelope to the assigned destination set.

controls.name: Random Assign
controls.description: Assigns the onboard random source to a target parameter.

controls.name: Velocity Assign
controls.description: Scales the velocity input against the selected destination.
controls.detail: velocity routable to nearly any parameter

controls.name: Preset / Memory
controls.description: Stores and recalls presets from SD card memory.

inputs.name: Gate
inputs.description: Triggers the onboard envelope and voice articulation.

inputs.name: CV 1-11
inputs.description: Assignable CV inputs for engine, filter, envelope, randomizer, or mix destinations.

inputs.name: Select Bus
inputs.description: Receives preset recall messages from a compatible master module.

outputs.name: OUT L
outputs.description: Left audio output with stereo widening applied.

outputs.name: OUT R
outputs.description: Right audio output with stereo widening applied.

behaviors.name: Three engines
behaviors.description: Classic routes saw and square waves through switchable analog filtering, VCA, and distortion. Wavetable reuses the analog chain. FM uses up to four operators and three macro controls.

behaviors.name: Envelope and random routing
behaviors.description: The onboard envelope, random generator, and velocity input can be routed to nearly any parameter, so the same patch can swing between stable, animated, and chaotic states.

behaviors.name: Preset memory
behaviors.description: The module stores 256 presets on SD card and recalls them non-volatilely. Select Bus support lets a master module step through stored sounds.

behaviors.name: Velocity-driven articulation
behaviors.description: Velocity scales more than output level. It can also move parameter destinations, so harder hits can brighten the tone or push the filter harder.

behaviors.name: Stereo widening
behaviors.trigger: use OUT L / OUT R as a pair
behaviors.description: The voice remains effectively monophonic at the source, but the output stage widens the image enough to place it like a finished voice in a mix.

patchIdeas.name: Classic bassline
patchIdeas.patch: Classic engine · saw/square mix into analog VCF and VCA · Gate fires the onboard envelope · Velocity adds accent and pushes the filter harder · dry, direct bass voice that sits like a complete mono synth.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Ballista Blast:
* Engine Select: Classic
* Envelope Assign: VCA + VCF
* Velocity Assign: accent

Envelope:
VCA:
Filter:
Output:

- Sequencer (Gate) g> Ballista Blast (Gate)
- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Ballista Blast (CV)
- Ballista Blast (OUT L) -> Filter (In)
- Filter (Out) -> VCA (In)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)
- VCA (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Wavetable lead
patchIdeas.patch: Wavetable engine · Tune set to the song root · Random assigned to wavetable motion · Envelope short and snappy · stereo output into a chorus or delay gives glassy lead lines that stay fresh without patching extra modulators.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Ballista Blast:
* Engine Select: Wavetable
* Random Assign: wavetable position
* Envelope Assign: amplitude

LFO:
Delay:
Output:

- LFO (Out) >> Ballista Blast (Random CV)
- Ballista Blast (OUT L) -> Delay (In)
- Delay (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: FM bell voice
patchIdeas.patch: FM engine · Ratio lock engaged · FM Index moderate · Trigger fires the internal decay envelope · quick note bursts become bell-like strikes with controllable inharmonicity and clean stereo spread.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Ballista Blast:
* Engine Select: FM
* Ratio: locked
* FM Index: moderate

Sequencer:
Envelope:
Output:

- Sequencer (Gate) g> Ballista Blast (Gate)
- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Ballista Blast (Chord CV)
- Ballista Blast (OUT L) -> Output (Left)
- Ballista Blast (OUT R) -> Output (Right)

patchIdeas.name: Preset motion
patchIdeas.patch: Store four related presets · drive Select Bus from a clocked master module · Velocity or random motion changes the filter and distortion depth between recalls · step through evolving but repeatable voice states without touching the panel.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Ballista Blast:
* Preset / Memory: banked
* Engine Select: Classic

Clock:
Sequencer:
Output:

- Clock (Out) c> Sequencer (Clock)
- Sequencer (Gate) g> Ballista Blast (Gate)
- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Ballista Blast (Select Bus)
- Ballista Blast (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- Ballista Blast (OUT R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Velocity-shaped chord stab
patchIdeas.patch: Chord mode enabled · chord CV sets inversion and voicing · Velocity drives both timbre and output level · short triggers produce stab chords that behave like a playable poly-voice inside one module.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Ballista Blast:
* Engine Select: Classic
* Envelope Assign: output level
* Velocity Assign: chord brightness

Sequencer:
Output:

- Sequencer (Gate) g> Ballista Blast (Gate)
- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Ballista Blast (Chord CV)
- Ballista Blast (OUT L) -> Output (In)
